_metadata.notes: v2026.3: Complete 132-plan FEHB premium dataset from OPM Excel files. 19 nationwide FFS plans + 459 regional HMO plan entries across 56 locations. All premiums are enrollee share (employee/annuitant pays).

historical_increases._note: Enrollee share average increase pct. Source: OPM annual FEHB premium announcements.

premium_changes.source_note: Of 129 plans available in both 2025 and 2026

government_contribution.description: Maximum government contribution (72% of weighted average)
government_contribution.contribution_formula: Lesser of 72% of weighted average OR 75% of plan premium

ffs.name: Fee-for-Service
ffs.description: Nationwide plans with PPO networks. Most flexibility for provider choice.

hmo.name: Health Maintenance Organization
hmo.description: Regional plans with specific service areas. Typically lower premiums, narrower networks.

self_plus_one_exceeds_family.description: Some plans have Self Plus One premiums higher than Self and Family
self_plus_one_exceeds_family.enrollee_option: Enrollees may elect Self and Family even when covering only one dependent
self_plus_one_exceeds_family.reference: OPM Self Plus One > Self and Family chart

tcc.name: Temporary Continuation of Coverage
tcc.description: Continued coverage for former employees, spouses, children losing eligibility

former_spouse.description: Coverage available to former spouses of federal employees

plan_premium_data._description: Complete 2026 FEHB plan premium data from OPM premium rate charts

_premium_fields.biweekly_enrollee: Enrollee share of biweekly premium (what you pay)
_premium_fields.biweekly_yoy_change: Year-over-year change in enrollee biweekly payment
_premium_fields.monthly_enrollee: Enrollee share of monthly premium (what you pay)
_premium_fields.monthly_yoy_change: Year-over-year change in enrollee monthly payment
